title: Hermes Agent Tutorial: How to Setup & Use Open Source AI Agent for Beginners
summary: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent framework available on OpenRouter with nearly 200K GitHub stars. It can be set up locally on Mac or Windows for free, supports integration with Telegram, features persistent memory and cron job scheduling, and can self-improve by writing its own new skills without user intervention.
writeup: The video walks through setting up and using Hermes Agent, an open-source AI agent framework distributed via OpenRouter with nearly 200K GitHub stars. It covers free local installation on Mac or Windows, Telegram integration, persistent memory, and cron job scheduling for recurring tasks. The notable claim is self-improvement: the agent can write its own new skills without user intervention, extending agentic workflows beyond a fixed toolset.
